headline: Energy shock seen hitting Asia the most, followed by Europe and US: MS
summary: Investing.com -- A surge in oil prices will weigh most heavily on Asian economies, with Europe and the U.S. facing more moderate economic impacts, according to analysts at Morgan Stanley.

raw.headline: Energy shock seen hitting Asia the most, followed by Europe and US: MS

headline: Kuwait cuts oil output as storage fills up
summary: Investing.com -- Kuwait has started reducing production at some oil fields after exhausting its crude storage capacity, according to a report from the Wall Street Journal, citing people familiar with the matter.

raw.headline: Kuwait cuts oil output as storage fills up

headline: BofA breaks down economic risks for the U.S. from the Iran conflict
summary: Investing.com -- The conflict involving Iran is unlikely to significantly derail the U.S. economy in the near term, though several channels could amplify the impact if energy prices rise sharply, according to analysts at Bank of America.

raw.headline: BofA breaks down economic risks for the U.S. from the Iran conflict

headline: Dow stock jumps 4.5% on JPMorgan upgrade amid oil surge
summary: Investing.com -- Dow Inc. (NYSE:DOW) shares rose 4.5% Friday following an upgrade to overweight from JPMorgan, which raised its price target to $40 from $26. The move marked the third upgrade for the chemical maker this week, after similar actions from BMO and KeyBanc.

headline: Why BCA says Trump ’faces a tough trade-off’
summary: Investing.com -- The escalating conflict involving Iran could place President Donald Trump in a difficult position as geopolitical objectives collide with domestic economic priorities, according to analysts at BCA Research.

headline: Dividend Aristocrats in a Shaky Market: KO, PG, JNJ, and 2 Others Built to Last
summary: The market’s fear gauge tells the story clearly. The VIX hit 21.15 as of March 4, 2026, up 29.4% in a single month. Consumer sentiment sits at 56.4 on the University of Michigan index, deep in pessimistic territory. The 10-year Treasury still sits at 4.09%, keeping investors on edge. headline: Why ’Sell America’ is currently on hold
summary: Investing.com -- The recent escalation of the conflict in the Middle East has pushed global markets into a risk-off mode, but analysts at Barclays say the shift has so far been orderly rather than panic-driven.

headline: Markets face 10% correction, up to 15% if Hormuz blockade holds: Yardeni
summary: Investing.com -- Global equity markets could face a significant pullback as the conflict continues in the Middle East, according to analysts at Yardeni Research.

headline: 1 Unpopular Stock That Should Get More Attention and 2 We Question
summary: Wall Street’s bearish price targets for the stocks in this article signal serious concerns. Such forecasts are uncommon in an industry where maintaining cordial corporate relationships often trumps delivering the hard truth.
